ddls:
CREATE TABLE "numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number entry */,
  "decimal_value" TEXT /* Decimal representation of the number */,
  "hex_value" TEXT /* Hexadecimal representation of the number */,
  "octal_value" TEXT /* Octal representation of the number */,
  "quadal_value" TEXT /* Quadal representation of the number */,
  "binary_value" TEXT /* Binary representation of the number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_history" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record */,
  "number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number that was converted */,
  "from_format" TEXT /* Format from which the conversion was made */,
  "to_format" TEXT /* Format to which the conversion was made */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date of the conversion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the conversion was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the conversion failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("number_id") REFERENCES numbers ("number_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is logged in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_types" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format type */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the numeric format (e.g., Decimal, Hexadecimal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the numeric format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rate entry */,
  "from_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format being converted from */,
  "to_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format being converted to */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula or algorithm used for the conversion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversion rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rates_from_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_format_id") REFERENCES format_types ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rates_to_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_format_id") REFERENCES format_types ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., Info, Error) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_conversions" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch conversion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the batch conversion */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Decimal to Binary) */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date of the batch conversion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the batch conversion (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the batch conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the batch conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_conversions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_conversion_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion result */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch conversion */,
  "number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number that was converted */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the converted value */,
  "converted_value" TEXT /* The resulting converted value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_conversion_results_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("number_id") REFERENCES numbers ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_conversion_results_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batch_conversions ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error record */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_errors_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES conversion_history ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin action */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., user management) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_actions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup record */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date when the backup was made */,
  "backup_location" TEXT /* Location where the backup is stored */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the backup in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backup record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborative_workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workspace was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workspace was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the workspace (e.g., owner, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_membership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_membership_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES collaborative_workspaces ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspace_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace */,
  "number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was added to the workspace */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated in the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_data_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES collaborative_workspaces ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspace_data_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("number_id") REFERENCES numbers ("number_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share entry */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number that was shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the data was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was shared */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("number_id") REFERENCES numbers ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES collaborative_workspaces ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the numeric format */,
  "conversion_count" INTEGER /* Number of conversions performed for the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES format_types ("format_id")
)
